title: To Temptation
content:
Here's to temptation!
    Give us strength and grace
    Against her witching smile,
    To set our face!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Oliver Herford, titled "To Temptation", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
